findings.text: OBSERVATION_ONLY: Line 86 activates the venv in the parent shell, so subsequent commands inherit the venv before the new subshells run. Pre-existing, not caused by this fix.
findings.proposed_fix: If broader cleanup is allowed later, wrap line 86 in a subshell too.
findings.disposition: logged as out_of_scope_observation — not caused by this cycle's diff
